## Summary

## Linked spec / issue

<!-- e.g. Implements SPEC.md §3.3, closes #42. If you changed a contract, link the spec PR or note that the spec is updated in this PR. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Spec change (BRD / SPEC / docs/*)
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Infra / CI
- [ ] Docs only

## Test plan

<!-- What did you run? What did you observe? Include commands and outputs where useful. -->

- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (backend changes)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test` passes locally (frontend changes)
- [ ] Manual smoke test (describe)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For any UI change. Drag & drop here. -->

## Contract impact

- [ ] No public contract changed.
- [ ] `SPEC.md` updated.
- [ ] `docs/api/openapi.yaml` updated.
- [ ] Agent contract under `docs/agents/` updated.
